title: Punjab National Bank Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Entry-Level)
company: Punjab National Bank Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Punjab National Bank Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Punjab National Bank Consulting Pvt Ltd invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Credit Analyst at our Chandigarh location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Punjab National Bank Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Punjab National Bank Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Risk Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Punjab National Bank Consulting Pvt Ltd!
